# All Done Sites

> All Done Sites builds, hosts and maintains done-for-you websites for South
> African small businesses on one simple monthly fee. There is no upfront cost:
> we build your site free to start, then look after it for you. Every site is
> built to be found by both search engines and AI assistants.

All Done Sites is a South African web design and hosting service. We design,
build, host, secure and update small business websites as a monthly
subscription, so owners get a professional site without a big upfront bill or
any technical work. We also serve clients in the US, UK and Europe with
region-based pricing.

Contact: WhatsApp or call +27 82 222 7457, hello@alldonesites.com,
https://alldonesites.com

## Who this is for

- Local and service businesses: plumbers, electricians, builders, salons,
  cafés, cleaners and similar trades with no website or only a social page.
- Professionals and practices: therapists, consultants, accountants, attorneys,
  clinics and engineers who need a credible online presence.
- Growing companies, startups, e-commerce and SaaS that need more than a basic
  brochure site.
- First-time owners who want it handled for them, with no upfront cost.

## How it works

1. Tell us about your business and the look you want.
2. We design and build your site, free to start, and show you a draft.
3. You review and request changes until you are happy.
4. We launch it and handle hosting, security and updates for you.

Most sites are ready in 7 to 14 days, depending on complexity and how quickly we
receive your content.

## What is included

Every plan includes design, fast and secure hosting, SSL, automated backups, a
mobile-friendly build, professional email at your domain, monthly content
updates and SEO. Sites are also structured to be indexed and referenced by AI
assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Google's AI overviews.

## Plans and pricing (South Africa)

- Launch: R799 a month. Single-page website, 1 small update a month, 2
  professional mailboxes.
- Business: R2,200 a month. Up to 5 pages, custom branding, 2 updates a month,
  6 mailboxes.
- Premium: R3,600 a month. Up to 12 pages, advanced sections, priority support,
  14 mailboxes.
- Custom / Enterprise: a tailored monthly plan for e-commerce, bookings or
  integrations.

Prices are in South African rand. The website shows local pricing for the US,
UK and Europe. After your first 12 months, the site's code and files can be
transferred to you, so it is yours to keep or move.

## Common questions

### How much does a website cost in South Africa?
Costs vary widely. All Done Sites removes the big upfront fee: plans start at
R799 a month and include design, hosting, security, email and updates, with the
build done free to start.

### Do I have to pay a large upfront fee for a website?
No. All Done Sites builds your site free to start, then charges one simple
monthly fee. There is no big setup cost.

### Who builds and maintains websites for small businesses in South Africa?
All Done Sites is a South African service that designs, builds, hosts and
maintains small business websites on a monthly subscription, so you never have
to touch the code.

### Is a Facebook or Instagram page enough for my business?
Social pages help, but you do not control them and they rank poorly on Google.
A proper website you own builds credibility, shows up in search and AI answers,
and gives customers one trusted place to find you.

### How long does it take to get a website built?
Most All Done Sites websites are ready in 7 to 14 days, depending on complexity
and how quickly you send your content.

### Do I own the website?
Yes. After your first 12 months the site's code and files can be transferred to
you, so it is yours to keep or move. While you are subscribed, we host, maintain
and look after everything.

### Can my website be found and referenced by AI assistants?
Yes. All Done Sites builds every site with clean, well-structured, clearly
written content and schema markup, so it can be indexed and referenced by AI
assistants and AI search, not just traditional search engines.

- [Terms](https://alldonesites.com/terms), [Privacy](https://alldonesites.com/privacy).

## Guides

Practical, South Africa specific guides answering the questions small business
owners ask before getting a website.

- [How much does a website cost in South Africa?](https://alldonesites.com/guides/how-much-does-a-website-cost-in-south-africa): build price ranges, the ongoing costs people forget, and upfront vs monthly models.
- [Do you need a website if you have a Facebook page?](https://alldonesites.com/guides/website-vs-facebook-page): why a website gives you ownership, credibility and search visibility that a social page cannot.
- [Monthly vs upfront: which is better for a small business website?](https://alldonesites.com/guides/monthly-vs-upfront-website-cost): a balanced look at cash flow, maintenance, ownership and total cost.
- [How to get a website for your South African small business](https://alldonesites.com/guides/how-to-get-a-website-for-your-small-business): a step-by-step from .co.za domain to launch and upkeep.
- [How long does it take to build a website?](https://alldonesites.com/guides/how-long-does-it-take-to-build-a-website): realistic timelines by site type and the factors that speed it up or slow it down.
- [What is included in website hosting and maintenance?](https://alldonesites.com/guides/whats-included-in-website-hosting-and-maintenance): what hosting and maintenance each cover, and why ongoing upkeep matters.
